headline: Assessing Franklin Resources (BEN) Valuation After A Year Of Strong Shareholder Returns
summary: Franklin Resources overview Franklin Resources (BEN) has been drawing attention after a solid year of share price gains and a recent move higher over the past month, prompting fresh questions about how its valuation lines up with fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Franklin Resources. With the share price at US$26.55, the recent 7 day share price return of 6.0% and 30 day return of 7.8% sit against a 1 year total shareholder return of 59.4%, suggesting momentum has been building over...
